public_chase_best.blend: Exact 0.8094 historical public reference blended toward the clean 0.8124 anchor with horizon alphas [0.225, 0.375, 0.55, 0.75, 1.00]

baseline3_push.stop_condition: last verified crossed: Team 5 public score 0.7915 < Baseline 3 public score 0.8056
baseline3_push.quota_recommendation: 2026-05-27 quota remains 6/6 used. A v4 queue of six sanity-checked exact-history horizon hedges is prepared for the 2026-05-28 08:00 Taipei reset; live-gate before any submission.

recent_findings.name: Prepared v4 private-hedge frontier queue for 2026-05-28
recent_findings.interpretation: Generated six v4 exact-history horizon hedge candidates for the next reset. The queue focuses on the v3 week-1 signal around alpha 0.225 and includes late-anchor private-risk hedges. No v4 candidate was submitted because 2026-05-27 quota was already 6/6 used.

recent_findings.name: Manual private-hedge frontier 2026-05-27
recent_findings.interpretation: A five-submission v3 horizon frontier after the teammate first-queue readout improved Team 5 public MAE to 0.7915. Ref 53074980 is selected over same-score ref 53075001 because it is closer to the clean 0.8124 anchor; ref 53075022 and prior refs 53038040/53038036/53038033 remain stronger private-risk alternatives. All v3 files are public-chase/final-selection artifacts, not reportable method claims.

recent_findings.name: Teammate LightGBM v3 enhanced candidate screen
recent_findings.interpretation: First 2026-05-27 queue item was already submitted by teammate as Kaggle ref 53074655 and scored public 1.0685. Keep as negative public readout with provenance_pending; do not promote or use as reportable lineage.

recent_findings.name: Manual private-hedge frontier 2026-05-26
recent_findings.interpretation: A six-submission v2 local horizon frontier improved Team 5 public MAE to 0.7917; the public-best file is farther from the clean 0.8124 anchor than v1, so keep refs 53038036/53038040 as stronger private-risk alternatives and label all v2 files as public-chase/final-selection artifacts, not reportable method claims.

recent_findings.name: Manual private-hedge frontier 2026-05-25
recent_findings.interpretation: A six-submission v1 horizon frontier improved Team 5 public MAE to 0.7922 while keeping the best file closer to the clean 0.8124 anchor than the prior 0.7930 public-best; label all v1 files as public-chase/final-selection artifacts, not reportable method claims.

recent_findings.name: Manual private-hedge Baseline 3 push
recent_findings.interpretation: A 2026-05-24 manual six-submission hedge batch improved Team 5 public MAE to 0.7930 while adding closer-to-anchor private hedge candidates at 0.7933 and 0.7945; label all as public-chase, not reportable method claims.

recent_findings.name: Baseline 3 public-chase crossing
recent_findings.interpretation: Public-first exact-history blend crossed Baseline 3 on 2026-05-23. Treat as leaderboard/selection artifact, not a reportable legal modeling claim.

recent_findings.name: Baseline 3 public-first push
recent_findings.interpretation: Live leaderboard now has Team 5 ahead of Baseline 3 public MAE 0.8056 after exact-history public-chase probes; keep reportable lineage labels separate.

recent_findings.name: CatBoost 35% blend
recent_findings.interpretation: Nearby CatBoost-weight probe; public score regressed versus the 30% CatBoost anchor.

recent_findings.name: CatBoost horizon ramp
recent_findings.interpretation: Meaningful secondary private-LB hedge, but weaker than the 30% public anchor.

recent_findings.name: CatBoost tail2737 rerun
recent_findings.interpretation: Legal rerun, not submitted; supports the CatBoost hypothesis but does not change the anchor.

recent_findings.name: LGBM micro rolling rerun
recent_findings.interpretation: Strong local diagnostic/blend input; needs Kaggle or pseudo-private evidence before becoming an anchor.

recent_findings.name: GRU family public readout
recent_findings.interpretation: Risk-ranked GRU stack and raw GRU probes failed public transfer on 2026-05-23; pause GRU-family submissions.

implementation_summary: Direct-horizon boosted-tree models with leakage-aware 91-day-gapped score-history features and LGB/XGB/CatBoost ensembling.
validation_note: Holdout and rolling-origin local MAE are not directly comparable; Kaggle public/private leaderboard results are the external generalization checks.
banned_current_state_phrases: Current status: reproducible best legal public MAE = **0.8232**
目前狀態： repo 紀錄的最佳 legal public MAE = **0.8232**
